Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Henry Kwan.
Attorney Nichole Santiago for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joya Streeter is present.
Attorney Jessica Chia appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Mar. 9, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
